summary: TTS | Broadcast Options Tab - Video Feed
description:
GIVEN a user is logged in
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user has selected a game feed for playback

steps.action:
WHEN focus is assigned to the Broadcast Options tab in the scrubber
AND the user navigates down from the Broadcast tab to the video feed options
steps.result: THEN "Video feed, <team_name>, <broadcast_name>, press select to change feed" is spoken
